title: Tree Brush
description: This datapack/mod adds a brush tool to place trees of your choices and vegetations quickly where you want in one click. Biome, vegetations and so on are placed automatically based on the kind of tree selected
body:
To get started, run **/function tree_brush:wand**

![An in-game screenshots with all the brush tools in the inventory and a world where the brush was used](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/mYUflGVi/images/715fe3364e60f7346d8015aac1e680142270e227.png)

This datapack allows to place trees, biomes and vegetation very quickly, in a single click without complicated commands, whilst checking that the block below the tree is a grass block to avoid missclicking.

Current brush:
- Oak
- Birch
- Spruce
- Jungle
- Acacia
- Mangrove/Swamp oak
- Grass/vegetation brush for plains and so on
- Tall birch ([More Biomes required](https://modrinth.com/datapack/improved-more-biomes))
- Big red mushroom ([More Biomes required](https://modrinth.com/datapack/improved-more-biomes))


Old demo with the oak brush tool:
![An old video featuring the oak brush tool](https://i.imgur.com/BQLYEyF.gif)
